s: In 2012, Derek Norris suited up for OAK as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.201, OPS 0.625, HR 7, RBI 34, WAR 0.600.
In 2013, Derek Norris suited up for OAK as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.246, OPS 0.754, HR 9, RBI 30, WAR 2.900.
In 2014, Derek Norris suited up for OAK as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.270, OPS 0.763, HR 10, RBI 55, WAR 2.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> SDP).
In 2015, Derek Norris suited up for SDP as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.250, OPS 0.709, HR 14, RBI 62, WAR 3.800. Notable context: Joined SDP.
In 2016, Derek Norris suited up for SDP as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.186, OPS 0.583, HR 14, RBI 42, WAR 0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (SDP -> TBR).
In 2017, Derek Norris suited up for TBR as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.201, OPS 0.637, HR 9, RBI 24, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined TBR.
